source_pr.title: *: make insert with calculated value behave the same as MySQL.
source_pr.body:
This PR try to fix most cases of #4488.
Now `insert` can correctly handle calculated value based on other columns, 
such as `insert into t1 set b=a+1` and `insert into t1 (b) value (a)`.
Last, as mentioned in issue, make the error message more readable.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("0", "2")) (executor/write_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("0", "2")) (executor/write_test.go)
